summary: Made surgical seam edits: rewrote the opening paragraph to an action-led construction distinct from Chapter 10's smell-led station opening, and added a one-line end handoff that points directly to the pre-dawn Seoul Station move.
edits: Reframed the first paragraph to start on Ina's checksum action (not a smell/location scaffold), while preserving the same setup and tone.
Added a final handoff sentence signaling the immediate move to Seoul Station before dawn for cleaner Chapter 9 -> Chapter 10 continuity.
